key_insight_phrases.volatile: {measure_col_label} is volatile — forecasting will be difficult
key_insight_phrases.highly_volatile: {measure_col_label} is highly volatile — use with caution for forecasting

caveats.denominator_unstable: The trend itself is unstable (CoV={cov}) — volatility may mask underlying patterns
caveats.minimum_data_warning: Only {period_count} periods — stability estimate may be unreliable
